queries.question: Give me the missions each reporter has written about.
queries.sql: SELECT Missions.mission_name  from Space_Reporters_Missions join Missions on Space_Reporters_Missions.mission_id = Missions.mission_id join Space_Reporters on Space_Reporters_Missions.space_reporter_id = Space_Reporters.reporter_id   GROUP BY Space_Reporters_Missions.mission_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Space_Reporters_Missions.space_reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Space_Reporters)

queries.question: Give me the missions each reporter has written about.
queries.sql: select space_reporters.full_name , missions.mission_name from Space_Reporters_Missions join Missions on Space_Reporters_Missions.mission_id = Missions.mission_id join Space_Reporters on Space_Reporters_Missions.space_reporter_id = Space_Reporters.reporter_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?mission_name WHERE {
  ?space_reporters_missions a :Space_Reporters_Missions .
  ?missions a :Missions .
  ?space_reporters_missions p:hasMissions ?missions .
  ?space_reporters a :Space_Reporters .
  ?space_reporters_missions p:hasSpace_Reporters ?space_reporters .
  ?space_reporters p:name ?full_name .
  ?missions p:mission_name ?mission_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the missions each reporter has written about.
